description: Visão híbrida: blocos Claude Code usam Prometheus (métricas OTLP); blocos Code + Cowork usam Loki (eventos OTLP). Cada seção indica a fonte no título.

targets.expr: sum(max_over_time(claude_code_session_count_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"}[$__range]))

sum(max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"}[$__range]))

sum(max_over_time(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"}[$__range]))

sum(max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type", type="input"}[$__range]))

sum(max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type", type="output"}[$__range]))

sum(max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type", type="cacheRead"}[$__range]))

sum(max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type", type="cacheCreation"}[$__range]))

sum(count_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork", attributes_user_email=~"$user_email", attributes_model=~"$model", attributes_effort=~"$effort", attributes_query_source=~"$query_source", attributes_terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" [$__range]))

sum(sum_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork", attributes_user_email=~"$user_email", attributes_model=~"$model", attributes_effort=~"$effort", attributes_query_source=~"$query_source", attributes_terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" | unwrap attributes_cost_usd [$__range]))

sum(sum_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork", attributes_user_email=~"$user_email", attributes_model=~"$model", attributes_effort=~"$effort", attributes_query_source=~"$query_source", attributes_terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" | unwrap attributes_input_tokens [$__range]))

sum(sum_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork", attributes_user_email=~"$user_email", attributes_model=~"$model", attributes_effort=~"$effort", attributes_query_source=~"$query_source", attributes_terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" | unwrap attributes_output_tokens [$__range]))

sum(sum_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork", attributes_user_email=~"$user_email", attributes_model=~"$model", attributes_effort=~"$effort", attributes_query_source=~"$query_source", attributes_terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" | unwrap attributes_cache_read_tokens [$__range]))

sum(sum_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork", attributes_user_email=~"$user_email", attributes_model=~"$model", attributes_effort=~"$effort", attributes_query_source=~"$query_source", attributes_terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" | unwrap attributes_cache_creation_tokens [$__range]))

sum(rate(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"}[5m]))

sum by (model) (rate(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"}[5m]))

sum by (model) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"}[$__range]))

topk(20, sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"}[$__range])))

sum by (model) (max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type", type="cacheRead"}[$__range]))

sum by (model) (max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type", type="cacheCreation"}[$__range]))

sum by (model) (max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type", type="input"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Token Mix by Model (input vs cache read vs cache write)

panels.description: Heatmap temporal mostrando volume de eventos ao longo do tempo. Eixo X = hora do dia (UTC), Eixo Y = contagem total de eventos por hora (log entries), Cor = intensidade (número de eventos). Útil para visualizar picos de uso por hora.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork", attributes_user_email=~"$user_email", attributes_model=~"$model", attributes_effort=~"$effort", attributes_query_source=~"$query_source", attributes_terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"} | json | __error__="" [1h]))

panels.title: Volume de Eventos por Hora (contagem de log entries)

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (attributes_tool_name) (count_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork", attributes_user_email=~"$user_email", attributes_model=~"$model", attributes_effort=~"$effort", attributes_query_source=~"$query_source", attributes_terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_decision" | __error__="" [$__range])))

sum by (attributes_decision) (count_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork", attributes_user_email=~"$user_email", attributes_model=~"$model", attributes_effort=~"$effort", attributes_query_source=~"$query_source", attributes_terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_decision" | __error__="" [$__range]))

{service_name=~"claude-code|cowork", attributes_user_email=~"$user_email", attributes_model=~"$model", attributes_effort=~"$effort", attributes_query_source=~"$query_source", attributes_terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" | line_format "user={{ .attributes_user_email }} model={{ .attributes_model }} input={{ .attributes_input_tokens }} output={{ .attributes_output_tokens }} cost={{ .attributes_cost_usd }}"

sum by (effort) (max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"}[$__range]))

sum by (speed) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"}[$__range]))

sum by (query_source) (max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type", type="output"}[$__range]))

avg by (attributes_effort) (avg_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork", attributes_user_email=~"$user_email", attributes_model=~"$model", attributes_effort=~"$effort", attributes_query_source=~"$query_source", attributes_terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" | unwrap attributes_duration_ms [$__range]))

avg by (attributes_model) (avg_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork", attributes_user_email=~"$user_email", attributes_model=~"$model", attributes_effort=~"$effort", attributes_query_source=~"$query_source", attributes_terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" | unwrap attributes_cost_usd [$__range]))

topk(20, sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"}[$__range])))

sum by (terminal_type) (max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"}[$__range]))

sum by (model) (max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type", type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) / (sum by (model) (max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type", type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) + sum by (model) (max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{service_name="claude-code", user_email=~"$user_email", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", terminal_type=~"$terminal_type", type="input"}[$__range])))

{service_name=~"claude-code|cowork", attributes_user_email=~"$user_email", attributes_model=~"$model", attributes_effort=~"$effort", attributes_query_source=~"$query_source", attributes_terminal_type=~"$terminal_type"} | json

title: Claude Code Usage
